text.title: team-development Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for team-development as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Recommending "more standups" or "better communication" as the fix for most retro themes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: This is an LLM default; it rarely addresses the root cause and wastes ceremony time on the wrong intervention.

failure-mode.description: Setting skills matrix scores to 3 (median) when the agent has no information about a person.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unknown should be "unknown", not a guess; phantom scores drive incorrect gap-planning decisions.

failure-mode.description: Flagging recurring themes as "new" each sprint because the agent has no session memory.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pass last N synthesised theme files into context; without history the agent cannot detect patterns.
